title.zh: BurpSuite 验证码插件实验 - 自动化绕过验证码爆破
title.en: BurpSuite CAPTCHA Plugin Experiment - Automated CAPTCHA Bypass for Brute Force

description.zh: 使用 NEW_xp_CAPTCHA 插件实现 BurpSuite 验证码自动识别，提升登录爆破效率。
description.en: Use NEW_xp_CAPTCHA plugin to implement automated CAPTCHA recognition in BurpSuite for more efficient brute forcing.

content.zh:
部署验证码识别服务：
git clone https://github.com/smxiazi/NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
cd NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
python3 -m pip install muggle_ocr
python3 server.py
Starting server, listen at: 0.0.0.0:8899
content.en:
Deploy CAPTCHA recognition service:
git clone https://github.com/smxiazi/NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
cd NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
python3 -m pip install muggle_ocr
python3 server.py
Starting server, listen at: 0.0.0.0:8899

annotation.zh: 免费验证码识别接口，基于 muggle_ocr
annotation.en: Free CAPTCHA recognition API based on muggle_ocr

codeBlocks.code:
$ git clone https://github.com/smxiazi/NEW_xp_CAPTCHA.git
$ cd NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
$ python3 -m pip install muggle_ocr
$ python3 server.py
Starting server, listen at: 0.0.0.0:8899

content.zh:
BurpSuite 安装插件：
Extender -> Extensions -> [ADD] -> Type: Python -> 选择 xp_CAPTCHA.py
需要先安装 Jython Jar（2.7.1 及以上版本）
content.en:
Install BurpSuite plugin:
Extender -> Extensions -> [ADD] -> Type: Python -> Select xp_CAPTCHA.py
Requires Jython Jar (2.7.1 or above)

annotation.zh: Python 扩展需要 Jython 支持

content.zh:
Intruder 配置：
1. 在请求包 Header 中添加：xiapao: http://url/verify.html（验证码生成链接）
2. Payload Type 选择 Extension-generated
3. Select Generator 选择 xp_CAPTCHA
4. 设置单线程（Number of threads = 1）
content.en:
Intruder configuration:
1. Add Header: xiapao: http://url/verify.html (CAPTCHA generation URL)
2. Payload Type: Extension-generated
3. Select Generator: xp_CAPTCHA
4. Set single thread (Number of threads = 1)

annotation.zh: 单线程保证验证码识别准确性
annotation.en: Single thread ensures CAPTCHA recognition accuracy

content.zh:
爆破成功率统计：
简单验证码成功率较高
带混淆字符的验证码识别率较低：P(success) ≈ 1%
content.en:
Brute force success rate:
Simple CAPTCHAs have high success rate
CAPTCHAs with obfuscation have low recognition rate: P(success) ≈ 1%

annotation.zh: 实际渗透中混淆验证码识别率较低
annotation.en: In real penetration testing, obfuscated CAPTCHA recognition is limited

content.zh:
验证码绕过总结：
- 免费 OCR 接口适用于简单验证码
- 复杂混淆验证码需要更高级的 ML 模型
- 单线程限制影响爆破效率
- 可结合其他手段（社工、字典优化）提升成功率
content.en:
CAPTCHA bypass summary:
- Free OCR API works for simple CAPTCHAs
- Complex obfuscated CAPTCHAs need advanced ML models
- Single thread limits brute force efficiency
- Combine with other methods (social engineering, dictionary optimization)

annotation.zh: 验证码不是安全的银弹
annotation.en: CAPTCHA is not a security silver bullet
